MARCSubfieldLabel: Terms governing use and reproduction (R), Standardized terminology for use and reproduction rights (R), Uniform Resource Identifier (R), Materials specified (NR), Institution to which field applies (NR)
RDA Registry Label: has restriction on use of item
Transformation Notes:
Use same transformation process for the other subfields, but mint an item URI which is the subject of the property (see $5)

(item - minted) has manifestation exemplified (manifestation the MARC is describing)

Label and value of subfields a, b, c, d, f, g, q, "additional information at: "+ [value of $u]; "(applies to: +  [value of $3]); label and value of $1; "(at institution + [value of $5])"
